name: Rishabh Singh
title: Software Engineer & MERN Stack Developer
tagline: Building scalable backend systems and high-impact digital experiences.
bio: I am a full-stack engineer and competitive programmer currently at NIT Calicut. I specialize in C++, the MERN stack, and system design, with a strong focus on creating high-performance, architecturally sound applications. I've solved over 450+ algorithmic problems and maintain a 1150+ coding score on GeeksforGeeks.
